pageContext.name: Superman Silver Miniature
pageContext.description: Show off your love for SUPERMAN™ with this incredible silver miniature designed by 3D master sculptor Alejandro Pereira Ezcurra. The second in the series is inspired by the cover of Superman #204 as part of the For Tomorrow comic book story arc.   Using a minimum of 150g pure silver this amazing collectible showcases the hero in a powerful pose, with one foot on top of a gargoyle. The miniature is approximately 9 cm tall and the silver purity, DC copyright and unique serial number are detailed on the silver base.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, each is packaged inside a large, high-quality SUPERMAN™-themed case and comes with an additional stand, so you can display this awesome collectible with ease.   There will only be 1,000 casts made, fly in quick and grab yours today!
